summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: 5 BLUE 3:4:5 right triangles drawn at different scales, rotations, and centers across the top of the canvas. 5 YELLOW Arrows shoot from each triangle toward a single RED Dot in the moduli-plane Axes at the bottom-right, showing they all collapse to the point (b/a, γ) = (4/3, π/2). Bottom caption: all 5 triangles represent the same moduli-space point.
